title: Skill Keybind
description: A Fabric client-side mod for 1.21.11 that turns hotbar slot-based skills into customizable keybinds found in RPG servers.
body:
# SkillKeybind

# THIS MOD IS TAILORED TO DAWNMC (play.dawnmc.fun)

A Simple Fabric client-side mod for **1.21.11** that turns hotbar slot-based skills into customizable keybinds.

## What it does
**Skill keybinds** — Press a skill key, cast the skill, and exit automatically. No need to manually switch hotbar slots.

## Configuration

Open ModMenu → SkillKeybind to access the config screen.

- **Skill keys** — Click any skill button to bind it to a key. Default: Z, X, C, V, B, N.
- **Skill Mode Key** — Optional manual toggle for skill mode. Unbound by default.

## Usage

- upon joining the server and picking a class the /skill gui will pop up for a few secs to sync the hud to your class level
- open mod menu and search up the mod 'Skill Keybind' and configure and change the hud to your liking.
